spec_match.rationale: The Find input flows through RegExp.escape in literal mode, regex mode keeps raw patterns available, and the live comparison shows how the escaped source differs from naive new RegExp(input).

interactive.rationale: The page remains a real find/replace editor and now also has live naive-vs-safe match panes plus boundary presets that mutate the same tool state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index promises literal find/replace with a naive comparison, and the page now renders that comparison as live output rather than prose only.

edge_cases.rationale: The boundary lab explicitly demonstrates whole-word behavior for metacharacter literals such as $price, contrasting \b wrapping with a safer word-character lookaround.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes the required ChromeStatus feature link and the TC39 proposal link.

design_system.rationale: Raw hex and OKLCH colors were replaced with shared CSS variables, and local button background overrides now also set an explicit text color.

summary: Resolved: the find/replace page now clears the design-system invariants, cites ChromeStatus, and turns both previously static edge-case explanations into live RegExp.escape demonstrations.
